message:
fmt: normalize double-space alignment to single-space before assignment

Normalize drifted alignment padding (e.g. api_key  =, token  =,
client_secret  =) to single space across 16 source files. Cargo fmt
does not enforce alignment padding, so this convention drifted over
time. Pure whitespace changes with no semantic impact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
